pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; keeping the property at 17 would result in compilation against the wrong target bytecode version or failure if the build tool enforces the property against the active JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit version from the sqlite-jdbc dependency to inherit it from the Spring Boot BOM.
